# MC Hair Salon & Spa

> Upper East Side's premier luxury hair salon and spa, established in 2011.
> Located at 336 East 78th St, New York, NY 10075.
> Phone: (212) 988-5252 | Email: info@mchairsalon.com
> Instagram: @mchairsalonspa

## About

MC Hair Salon & Spa is a full-service luxury hair and beauty salon in Manhattan's Upper East Side neighborhood. Founded in 2011, MC specializes in precision haircuts, advanced color and balayage, blowouts, eyelash extensions, facials, and makeup artistry. The salon serves clients from the Upper East Side, Yorkville, and across New York City.

## Services & Pricing

### Haircuts
- Women's Cut & Style: from $45
- Men's Clip & Cut: from $30
- Children's Cut (under 7): from $20
- Girl's Haircut (7–12): from $35
- Boy's Haircut (7–12): from $25

### Blowouts & Styling
- Blow Out & Style: from $33
- Blow Out with Iron Work: from $40
- Updo & Special Event Styling: from $75

### Color Services
- Full Color (L'Oréal Majerel/Inoa): from $85
- Highlights / Balayage: from $120
- Corrective Color: from $200
- Hair Treatments: from $50

### Spa Services
- Eyelash Extensions: from $150
- Facial: from $80

### Makeup
- Makeup Application: from $75
- Special Event Makeup: from $150
- Bridal Makeup: from $200
- Airbrush Makeup: from $125
- Makeup Lesson (1 hr): from $100

### Wedding & Bridal Services
- Bridal Updo & Style: from $150
- Bridal Hair Trial: from $120
- Bridal Makeup: from $200
- Bridesmaid Hair: from $85 each
- On-Location Travel (NYC): from $150

## Operating Hours

- Monday: 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Tuesday: 10:30 AM – 7:30 PM
- Wednesday: 10:30 AM – 7:30 PM
- Thursday: 10:30 AM – 7:30 PM
- Friday: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Saturday: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Sunday: 11:00 AM – 6:00 PM

## Team

- **Kato** — Master Stylist. Specializes in precision cuts, balayage, and color correction. Over a decade of experience.
- **Megan** — Senior Stylist & Color Expert. Expert in L'Oréal color systems, highlights, and blowouts.
- **Sofia** — Spa Specialist. Specializes in lash extensions, facials, and spa treatments.
- **Marcus** — Men's Grooming Expert. Top choice for men's cuts, fades, and styling.
- **Isabella** — Resident Makeup Artist. Bridal makeup, airbrush, special events, and makeup lessons.

## Service Packages

Pre-purchased service bundles at exclusive pricing:
- Blowout Bundle (5 sessions): $149
- Color Club (3 full colors): $235
- Glam Pack (3 makeup sessions): $199
- Bridal Prep (full bridal beauty plan, 4 sessions): $449
- The Full Experience (cut + color + blowout + facial): $279
- Lash Love (extensions + fills): $269
- VIP Year (12 monthly blowouts): $329
- Wellness Ritual (3 facials): $210

## Gift Cards

Gift cards available in $25, $50, $100, and $200 denominations. Deliverable by email or SMS. Redeemable for any service.

## Location

336 East 78th St, New York, NY 10075
Neighborhood: Upper East Side / Yorkville, Manhattan
Nearest subway: 6 train at 77th St or 86th St
